title: Magic Super Sword
body:
### This resource pack replaces the diamond sword with a new, highly detailed model
Be sure to download it if you love fantasy, knights, and vanilla style.
![sword in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11f66ded8a41652657b40385162ccfe31d131f16.png)

3d model by purcaty
icon by purcaty
texture by purcaty
